name: Elemental Transfiguration: Stormgale Blessing
title: Elemental Transfiguration: Stormgale Blessing
desc: Wind and thunder surge, swift and unrelenting.
in_play_description:
Roll Phase: Always roll 2 Electro Dice and 2 Anemo Dice.
After you trigger an Electro Swirl reaction: Discard this card, then choose either Stormgale Blessing: Swift Bolt or Stormgale Blessing: Wind Force and add it to your Hand.

skills.desc:
Elemental Transfiguration: Electro Anemo
Roll Phase: Always roll 2 Electro Dice and 2 Anemo Dice.
After you trigger an Electro Swirl reaction: Discard this card, then choose either Stormgale Blessing: Swift Bolt or Stormgale Blessing: Wind Force and add it to your Hand.
